name: Booking Field Extractor
summary: All 7 booking artifacts ingested successfully. All 7 ExtractBookingField queries returned accurate, specific answers matching the raw artifact content. Negative test correctly identified irrelevant question. Multi-hostel disambiguation worked perfectly (Hanoi-specific check-in time isolated without confusion with Hue or Saigon).

phase1_ingest.details: All 7 artifacts ingested via IngestBooking. Each returned a valid booking ID, correct type, parsed confirmation code, provider, title, and structured details.

phase2_list.details: ListBookings returned 7 bookings. All have non-empty booking_id, correct type, non-empty rawSource. Types match submission types exactly.

tests.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
tests.answer: Your outbound flight (DL 472) departs from Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT on Monday, June 15, 2026.

tests.question: What is the cancellation policy?
tests.answer: Free cancellation is available until June 12, 2026, at 11:59 PM CEST. Cancellations made after this deadline will incur a charge for the first night (EUR 289.00), and no-shows will be charged for the full stay.

tests.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
tests.answer: The meeting point is at the Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side) at C/ de la Marina, 253, 08013 Barcelona; look for a guide with an orange 'Barcelona Expert Tours' sign and arrive 15 minutes early. You should bring a valid photo ID, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, a water bottle, and your confirmation. Additionally, you must follow the dress code by ensuring your shoulders and knees are covered.

tests.question: What insurance is included and what is the fuel policy?
tests.answer: The reservation includes Super CDW (Collision Damage Waiver) with zero excess and Theft Protection. The fuel policy is Full-to-Full.

tests.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
tests.answer: Check-in at the Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM on Monday, June 1, 2026.

tests.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
tests.answer: The booking includes a Kaiseki Dinner and a Traditional Japanese breakfast. Dinner is served in-room at either 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM, depending on your preference confirmed at check-in.

tests.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
tests.answer: The tour includes 12 food tastings across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Dietary accommodations include vegetarian and gluten-free options (with at least 48 hours' notice) as well as vegan substitutions for most stops.

phase4_negative.question: What is the hotel wifi password?
phase4_negative.answer: The provided source text is a flight confirmation for Delta Air Lines and does not contain any information regarding a hotel or a wifi password.
phase4_negative.details: AI correctly identified that the flight confirmation does not contain hotel/wifi information and did not fabricate an answer.

warnings.description: Hostel booking (multi-stop with 3 properties) was ingested as a single BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL with hotelDetails empty object ({}). The structured properties data is only in detailsJson. This means the typed hotelDetails proto fields (hotelName, checkInDate, etc.) are not populated for multi-property bookings. Not a bug per se, but could be improved to either split into 3 bookings or populate hotelDetails from the first property.

booking_ingestion.notes: All 7 artifacts ingested successfully with correct types, providers, confirmation codes, and structured detail extraction.

field_extraction_accuracy.notes: All 7 targeted questions returned specific, accurate answers matching raw artifact content. No vague non-answers, no hallucinations.

multi_property_disambiguation.notes: Hanoi check-in time correctly isolated from 3-hostel booking without confusing Hue or Saigon properties.

negative_test.notes: AI correctly identified irrelevant question and did not hallucinate hotel/wifi information from flight confirmation.

overall.notes: Perfect extraction accuracy across all 7 booking types plus negative test. The booking pipeline is robust and the AI field extraction is reliable.
